/usr/bin/c++ -g CMakeFiles/lib_net_test.dir/test/net_test_main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lib_net_test.dir/test/net/ip/v4_address.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lib_net_test.dir/test/net/ip/v4_endpoint.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lib_net_test.dir/test/net/sockets/socket_guard.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lib_net_test.dir/test/util/binary_deserializer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lib_net_test.dir/test/util/binary_serializer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lib_net_test.dir/test/util/cli_parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lib_net_test.dir/test/util/config.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lib_net_test.dir/test/util/intrusive_ptr.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lib_net_test.dir/test/util/ref_counted.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lib_net_test.dir/test/util/scope_guard.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lib_net_test.dir/test/util/serialized_size.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lib_net_test.dir/test/util/tokenizer.cpp.o -o lib_net_test  libnet.a lib/libgtest.a /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so
